---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

[📄 Download CV (PDF)](cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}

## Education

| Year | Degree | Institution |
|------|--------|-------------|
| 2012–2017 | Ph.D., Economics | Georgia Institute of Technology (USA) |
| 2011–2012 | M.A., Economics | Boston University (USA) |
| 2007–2011 | B.A., Taxation & Accounting | Central University of Finance and Economics (China) |

## Appointments

| Year | Position | Institution |
|------|----------|-------------|
| 2024–present | Assistant Professor | Macau University of Science and Technology |
| 2018–2024 | Assistant Professor | Hunan University |

## Languages

Chinese (native) · English (fluent) · French (elementary)

## Contact

- **Email:** [zzhai@must.edu.mo](mailto:zzhai@must.edu.mo)
- **Tel:** (853) 8897-3691
- **Office:** Room O924, School of Business, Macau University of Science and Technology, Avenida Wai Long, Taipa, Macau

*See [Research](research.qmd) for publications, working papers, grants, and service.*
